name_en: 💰In stock Kelly Elan Goat Leather MIlk White Gold/Silver Hardware Latest Kelly Elan Bestseller 🆕 Hand-waxed thread stitching
name_cn:
💰In stock Kelly Elan Goat Leather MIlk White Gold/Silver Hardware Latest Kelly Elan Bestseller 🆕 Hand-waxed thread stitching
New member of the Kelly family, Kelly Elan Size 27+ Replaces the first generation crossbody bag. Upon first sight, it feels like an enlarged Kelly To Go. Kelly Elan and Kelly 28 have similar bottom lengths. The bag's thickness is similar to the second generation. Large capacity. The shoulder strap is detachable but not adjustable in length. However, it suits any height. Detach the strap to instantly become a clutch, a bit like a Kelly Cut. In short, it's very beautiful
💘💘Love it, love it, highly recommended
